title: KiCK's Wither Shrines
description: Adds Wither shrines across the Nether to make the Wither fight much more epic.
body:
![The text "Wither Shrines" with a Wither skull projectile seperating the two words](https://kckarnige.online/res/wsb.png)

----

This is a data pack/mod that adds naturally generating shrines dedicated to the all-powerful Wither. For obvious reasons, I recommend using a boss overhaul mod like [Wither's Wrath](https://modrinth.com/datapack/witherswrath) to have the Wither's might be worthy of praise.

----

# Q&A 

### Q: Can I use this in my modpack?
A: Of course, just please make sure to give credit, whether the modpack is on Curseforge, Modrinth, or any other site.   
*As long as you don't attempt to claim the mod as your own, I don't mind.*

### Q: Can I redistrubute this?
A: Unless you're in a third-world country, no.

### Q: I have a suggestion!
A: Leave a comment on the PMC page! [Click here to do that.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/wither-shrines/) (You will need a PlanetMinecraft account first)
### Q: I don't have any other questions
A: If you like what I do, you can donate to my [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/kckarnige), my [CashApp](https://cash.app/$kckarnige), or [buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/kckarnige)!
